source.name: Global Wellbeing Initiative Dataset
source.notes: Response rates by country and demographic group. Values are proportions from 0 to 1.

indicators.label: Life in balance
indicators.question: Various Aspects of Life in Balance

indicators.label: Purpose: daily skill
indicators.question: Main Purpose in Life
indicators.option: Being good at what you do in your daily life

indicators.label: Purpose: family/friends
indicators.question: Main Purpose in Life
indicators.option: Caring for family and close friends

indicators.label: Purpose: helping others
indicators.question: Main Purpose in Life
indicators.option: Helping other people who need help

indicators.label: Focus: taking care of self
indicators.question: Focus on Taking Care of Themselves or Taking Care of Others

indicators.label: Focus: taking care of others
indicators.question: Focus on Taking Care of Themselves or Taking Care of Others

indicators.label: Enjoys daily work
indicators.question: Enjoy the Work You Do Every Day

indicators.label: Work improves others' lives
indicators.question: Work Significantly Improves the Lives of Others Outside of Household

indicators.label: Many work choices
indicators.question: Many Choices in Type of Work
